name: =?utf-8?Q?Senator=20Roger=20Marshall?=
subject: H.R. 1 is an attack on democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for Marshall
body:
we've got to stop it before it's too late | |
---
| | [ ](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=8a91665351&e=0b94e583bc)
---
| | The Democrats’ latest push to change America as we know it is H.R. 1, which they call the “For the People Act.”

Not hardly. **H.R. 1 is an attack on American democracy, and it has only one goal: Transform America into a single-party socialist state.**

_This horrific bill would END voter ID. It would legalize ballot harvesting._

**And it would send your tax dollars to campaigns — even the ones you don’t like! That means your tax dollars could fund AOC, Bernie Sanders, and Elizabeth Warren’s next campaign.**

I’m not going to stand by and let the Democrats force this insanity through the U.S. Senate — but I need your help. [**Will you stand with me and SIGN my petition opposing H.R. 1 right now?**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=d3cc23a67f&e=0b94e583bc)
---
|
---
| [DEFEND DEMOCRACY »](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=3a6b07eb55&e=0b94e583bc "DEFEND DEMOCRACY »")
---
| Democrats know the American people have no interest in their agenda of higher taxes, more regulations, open borders, and less freedom.

**So they’re trying to rig the game so they’ll never lose — and they want to use your tax dollars to bankroll their campaigns.**

It’s shameful and un-American. And we must stop it.

**You have my word, I’m doing everything I can to stop H.R. 1 from becoming a reality, but it’s going to take the American people standing together to stop it from happening.**

[**Will you stand with me and my team? SIGN the petition here and let’s defend American democracy.**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=f0ef08a062&e=0b94e583bc)

Senator Roger Marshall

| Doc is defending life. He's standing for our jobs, our families, and our faith.

**He's taking our Kansas values to the U.S. Senate, but he can't get it done without your help.**

We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference.

However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=0799cdc67c&e=0b94e583bc&c=3f4b032252).

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Biden Falls on Stairs – Press Falls on Face
body:
Biden falls - not once, not twice, but thrice! No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tlekdtd-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlekdtd-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlekdtd-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Biden Falls on Stairs - Press Falls on Face](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlekdtd-kujkulhluu-j/)
Did Joe Biden's stumble on Air Force One's stairway receive the same mainstream media coverage it would have had Donald Trump fallen? Ha! Read what I think in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlekdtd-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlekdtd-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [A Terrible Bill, and Crisis at the Border](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlekdtd-kujkulhluu-d/)
Who doesn't love free money? Unless of course it's not really free. And what the heck's going on at our southern border? Read about it here (for free!) [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlekdtd-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlekdtd-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [The Democrats' "Election Reform Bill" is Anything But](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlekdtd-kujkulhluu-u/)
Don't be fooled. The "For the People Act of 2021" is actually a recipe for more election fraud. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlekdtd-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlekdtd-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Biden Finally Gets One Right](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlekdtd-kujkulhluu-n/)
Joe Biden has gotten so many things wrong in his first 6 weeks as President. Read this week about one thing I think he's gotten right. name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: For those who want me “canceled”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this [link](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57047548:69S8kfu8N:m:1:3206719985:22144B54704EA5367A5D4279B5028171:r) **ALERT: I 've had enough of the far-left's cancel culture! ** _If you 're with me, please sign my petition today to #CANCELCancelCulture!_ [**SUPPORT SARAH FOR GOVERNOR >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57047549:69S8kfu8N:m:1:3206719985:22144B54704EA5367A5D4279B5028171:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57047549:69S8kfu8N:m:1:3206719985:22144B54704EA5367A5D4279B5028171:r) Peter, the leftist cancel culture is out of control. Because liberals don't like my policies or the president I worked for, they want me canceled. And they hope their intimidation tactics will keep me quiet! _**But Peter, I know who I am. I know what I stand for. And I don 't back down. **_ That's why I'm running for Governor, and I want you to join me today to help fight back against this "cancel culture" that wants conservatives like YOU and me silenced forever! **By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:** [**ONE CLICK DONATE: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57047550:69S8kfu8N:m:1:3206719985:22144B54704EA5367A5D4279B5028171:r) [**ONE CLICK DONATE: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57047551:69S8kfu8N:m:1:3206719985:22144B54704EA5367A5D4279B5028171:r) [**ONE CLICK DONATE: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57047552:69S8kfu8N:m:1:3206719985:22144B54704EA5367A5D4279B5028171:r) [**ONE CLICK DONATE: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57047553:69S8kfu8N:m:1:3206719985:22144B54704EA5367A5D4279B5028171:r) **By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:** Peter, as Governor, I will be your voice, and never let them "cancel" us. Not now. Not ever. Because I know it's hard-working Americans like you who make our country great. **I hope you 'll contribute today to help stand up to the radical leftist "cancel culture", and send a bold message that WE WILL NOT BE SILENCED: [https://secure.winred.com/sarah-for-governor/action-2124813/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57047549:69S8kfu8N:m:1:3206719985:22144B54704EA5367A5D4279B5028171:r)** [**CHIP IN NOW TO SUPPORT SARAH FOR GOVERNOR**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57047549:69S8kfu8N:m:1:3206719985:22144B54704EA5367A5D4279B5028171:r) Peter, I am truly honored to already have the support of great conservatives - both at home and across the country. I would really like you to join us and become an official supporter of my campaign today... But first, I want to share a little bit more about who I am and what I believe - including some things you might not know about me. As Governor, I will defend our American right to be free of socialism and tyranny, our Second Amendment rights to keep our families safe, and our freedom of speech and religious liberty. **_I will not be intimidated by the serious challenges we face._** _I will stand with our brave law enforcement officers and promote law and order, and keep our communities safe by eliminating sanctuary cities._ I will lower taxes to reward hard work, allow our businesses to compete, grow, and prosper, and create more good jobs. [**SUPPORT SARAH FOR GOVERNOR NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57047549:69S8kfu8N:m:1:3206719985:22144B54704EA5367A5D4279B5028171:r) I stand up for my principles. And I don't back down. It's what I've done my entire life. I am a Christian. A wife. A mom. A proud Arkansan. _**I am fighting for you ...**and I will not retreat, I will not surrender, and I will not bow down to the radical left. Not now. Not ever._ Because here's the truth... I never worry about the far-left and their allies at CNN or the New York Times defining me, because I have a Creator who has already done that. If you want to support me, please chip in now to contribute to my campaign. **[CHIP IN NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57047549:69S8kfu8N:m:1:3206719985:22144B54704EA5367A5D4279B5028171:r)** I believe we will succeed in making a better future, but only if we hold the line against the attacks on our freedom and push forward with fresh ideas under a new generation of leadership. **And though my opponents will do everything in their power to destroy me, I will NOT apologize for who I am or who I am fighting for.** **I hope you choose to become a supporter of my campaign making an immediate donation now:[https://secure.winred.com/sarah-for-governor/action-2124813/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57047549:69S8kfu8N:m:1:3206719985:22144B54704EA5367A5D4279B5028171:r)** Thank you for your time, Peter. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57047549:69S8kfu8N:m:1:3206719985:22144B54704EA5367A5D4279B5028171:r) Sarah Huckabee Sanders |

Arkansas law limits contributions to $5,600 per election cycle. Each individual, political party committee, legislative caucus committee or approved political action committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600.

Corporate contributions are not permissible.

Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law.
State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.

name: Belinda Biafore
subject: quarter to date
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

Friend,

I hope this email finds you well.
I want to be as transparent as possible in explaining why I’m asking for your help today. So far this quarter, our email program has only raised $1,846.76 – and that’s just not where it should be. In the past we’ve had individual emails that have raised more than that. We feel that right now the WVDP is the strongest it’s ever been. Our Build Back Blue program has been an incredible success. We have an amazing staff and inspired volunteers. We are motivated, organized, and fired up. The only missing piece is our email fundraising. It seems to have fallen flat and we aren’t sure why. Our end of quarter deadline is coming up next week, and I’d love nothing more than to see this program reinvigorated.
Would you consider making a donation right now, even if it’s only for a dollar or two, and help us finish out this quarter with success? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Thank you so much!
Belinda Biafore, Chair, WVDP
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP02/1/67825/images/belinda.jpg]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

body:
After yesterday's historic voting rights hearing, they need to hear from you!

Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26720962/277840195/1793776944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjY4YTVjZC03YThkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hnNrrqx0X5kH_osfXzTfK5Pqf7WZBK52YYSENnl6oE0=&emci=72c415bc-f88c-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=fb68a5cd-7a8d-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=1037277)

| | Friend, Remember when we celebrated the U.S. House of Representatives’ vote on HR 1, the _For the People Act_? Yesterday, the U.S. Senate had its first hearing on the Senate counterpart, known as S 1. The next hearing will be held in the coming weeks, and in the meantime, your Senators need to hear from you! [Will you call your Senators right now and ask them to vote YES on S 1, the _For The People Act_? You can find their phone numbers here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26720963/277840196/2100491935?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjY4YTVjZC03YThkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hnNrrqx0X5kH_osfXzTfK5Pqf7WZBK52YYSENnl6oE0=&emci=72c415bc-f88c-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=fb68a5cd-7a8d-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=1037277) Two months ago, our democracy came under attack at the U.S. Capitol. These anti-democratic efforts are now in the state legislatures, where over 250 voter suppression bills seek to restrict voting access and hand the power to certify our elections over from state and local elections officials to state legislatures. We need Congress to pass S 1 to protect our freedom to vote safely, regardless of a voter’s race, age, or zip code. We must show our support now to stop voter suppression from silencing communities of color, young people, and seniors. [That’s why your Senators need to hear from you. Find your Senators’ phone numbers and tell them to vote YES on S 1, the _For The People Act—_ because we need federal voting rights protections now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26720964/277840224/2100491935?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjY4YTVjZC03YThkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hnNrrqx0X5kH_osfXzTfK5Pqf7WZBK52YYSENnl6oE0=&emci=72c415bc-f88c-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=fb68a5cd-7a8d-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=1037277) Thank you for using your voice to speak up for voters who deserve to be heard. Team Fair Fight Action
|

name: David McIntosh
subject: Here’s how we stop Pelosi’s Election Fraud Bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Club for Growth
body:
Some Democrats are also plotting to nuke the filibuster so they can pass their radical policies with just 50 votes, with VP Kamala Harris serving as the tie-breaker. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57710543:sJqdYAdNt:m:1:2105898951:6532521343D836AD12BCF30D9C66F0F8:r)
---
Dear N/A,

The Radical Left has been plotting some crazy ideas.

The Senate is set to vote on S.1 soon, also known as Pelosi's Election Fraud Bill, and is holding their first hearing on the bill TODAY.

**This disastrous legislation means:**
* States will no longer be able to control their own elections
* Laws governing political speech will be upended dramatically, undermining our First Amendment rights
* Your taxpayer money will fund candidates, even those you disagree with

**Some Democrats are also plotting to nuke the filibuster so they can pass their radical policies with just 50 votes** , with VP Kamala Harris serving as the tie-breaker.

Arizona Senator Kyrsten Sinema has been on the frontlines, pushing back against Democrats' most radical ideas.

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57710543:sJqdYAdNt:m:1:2105898951:6532521343D836AD12BCF30D9C66F0F8:r)
Now, we need you to tell Senator Sinema to keep fighting!

**[Call or email Senator Sinema now and tell her to fight for the filibuster and vote NO on Pelosi's Election Fraud Bill!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57710543:sJqdYAdNt:m:1:2105898951:6532521343D836AD12BCF30D9C66F0F8:r)**

[**Call or email Senator Sinema now!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57710543:sJqdYAdNt:m:1:2105898951:6532521343D836AD12BCF30D9C66F0F8:r)
Getting rid of the filibuster and jamming through Pelosi's Election Fraud Bill will be disastrous for our country, undermine the rights of the minority, and do nothing to restore Americans' faith in our elections.

**[That's why we need you to contact Senator Sinema right away!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57710543:sJqdYAdNt:m:1:2105898951:6532521343D836AD12BCF30D9C66F0F8:r)**

Thank you in advance for your help.

Sincerely,

David McIntosh
President, Club for Growth

[**Contact Senator Sinema ASAP!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57710543:sJqdYAdNt:m:1:2105898951:6532521343D836AD12BCF30D9C66F0F8:r)

| Paid for by Club for Growth

[**SUPPORT CONSERVATIVES NOW**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001J4y97ntmizAJp7S46H2Dce86u23QcMg91GsYCHFjzcdesaitLkZi13BZlTuxgyw5HmMc9pEVZ44eUGUy--PoBC5vLARyvjJbjanKNYkYSmNNE1Y1r3P9AZvkmNDfLDdFuvCa6c9PVccSsXupuz2HtAq7-hiy7XDB_6I1QfFQUb3fi3ifXDiUc-KjzPsq0PlIs7qGryrWvz4eFXitEbweNmSUH48Wne0xwah2gd2nAAj7Uub8aEObCPPpZDLSv-3eS8QR7KRnrvvSfASKW_Dn6TN8AoekvPGMXeNe876lx-atNeARsWDPbnVB8OD_uMAAHAM8ii1GCjjP4_Zhas5Ykv7ax6spNguZP3_KVLmUa_TsnMUxbbiLYBo0MAD4X1R2HJuufrtrCsm7BBNxoqrRDziRe62bn4y9j3_3GYxqgr_XnGfBa1in1IdCzc4JSE4xXOQv1rgD1ngFigRoscj_mh73DTIs7oWL&c=q7Irq2iYWypz2Mabx5oxliEPtTUExjADmKPlrBop9cB0Vr0Z0VGKVw==&ch=0YWw0gMmExc3nrYc4n_5oqW4DT-MgJh3_VAPbWgqemrQShf3zM8Now==)

She has defended the 2nd Amendment in front of the Supreme Court and in front of hostile activist judges around the country. She worked to make Arkansas the most pro-life state in the country. clean_body: We need someone new == Friend, Our country is being run by corrupt politicians. Whether it's Joe Biden as president or Andrew Cuomo and Gavin Newsom as governors, it's clear that the radical left's chosen leaders have one thing in common: abuse of power. Their executive overreach is not only unconstitutional, it's incredibly DANGEROUS. And the only way we can fight back against their tyrannical administrations is by supporting new, conservative leadership. And we know the perfect candidate to get behind. == Leslie Rutledge was the first female AND the first Republican Attorney General of Arkansas, and she's used her power to defend everyday Americans from the left's radical agenda. She has defended the 2nd Amendment in front of the Supreme Court and in front of hostile activist judges around the country. She worked to make Arkansas the most pro-life state in the country. And she kept her promise to keep Arkansans safe by protecting them from dangerous criminals & contacts. == Leslie is a true conservative. And as governor of Arkansas, she will continue to fight back against the executive overreach of Joe Biden and his cronies. Leslie will never give in to the radical left, and she will ALWAYS do whatever she can to protect our communities. If you want to stop the radical left and abuse of power by their leaders, it 's time to show your support for conservatives like Leslie Rutledge. name: Zack Stephenson
subject: Enough price gouging
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ebKrs9lf3sOMbDZvMYb21OI1W7Lem-Y3QX5U6OdwGmA=/Uklt7RrEfE4az8rZeqDRuwNXVTnY4vJPIGKG_XVgwFo=?refcode=032521)
| | Friend, Earlier this week in the Minnesota House we voted nearly on party lines to prohibit price gouging during a crisis. Just in the last year we have seen that whether it is a global pandemic or a once-in-a-generation weather event, a few bad actors will do anything to make a buck off of people in their time of need. This proposal seems rather common-sense, doesn't it? Apparently not so for a vast majority of Republicans in the Minnesota House. **They not only voted against this measure, but advocated for price gouging as a way to regulate the market.** That is simply wrong. Every Minnesotan deserves access to the things they need to survive. Your income shouldn't predetermine whether you're worthy of essential products. Minnesotans deserve to not just survive, but thrive -- through this pandemic and beyond. House DFLers will keep working to build a better future for all Minnesotans, no exceptions. Thank you, Rep. Zack Stephenson District 36A - Coon Rapids **P.S. The Political Contribution Refund Program has been renewed for 2021. Make your refundable donation of $50 (or $100 per couple) today.** [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ebKrs9lf3sOMbDZvMYb21OI1W7Lem-Y3QX5U6OdwGmA=/Uklt7RrEfE4az8rZeqDRuwNXVTnY4vJPIGKG_XVgwFo=?refcode=032521)
---

We have to stop the Left! |

---
| | Hi ,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor who is fighting the radical Left and converting the GOP into an effective fighting force! [I'm going to beat the radical Left, and I need your help](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=71d79835c1&e=ba6e67b849)!

I am disgusted with what traitors the Democrats have become.

It used to be that you could count on both parties to work to keep America safe.

Now, it is clear that the radical Dems are intent just on destroying the country.

_**The crisis at the southern border is a totally unnecessary blunder... It's "President Harris" enforcing her California Values on immigration, with disastrous results!**_

Here's what we know:

_-Biden has issued a gag order to ICE, to prevent the media from knowing the extent of the border crisis.

-Biden has spent $90 million to house illegal immigrants in hotels. Remember when he forced National Guardsmen to sleep in cold parking garages in the Capitol? Well, he's treating illegals better!

-"The Biden administration ignored warning signs, including briefings from senior Customs and Border Protection officials, about an impending crisis at the U.S. southern border.

-"The administration knew it was going to happen and everything since [Biden took office] has been how to manage it. The response is to merely manage the processing — not to stem the tide," a senior Customs and Border Protection official told Fox News.

-Policies like the Migrant Protection Protocols, also known as the "Remain-in-Mexico" policy, were crucial to ending "catch-and-release," a policy in which migrants are released into the U.S. while awaiting immigration hearings, Trump administration officials warned.

-Customs and Border Protection encountered 100,441 individuals in February, a 28% increase over January, the agency said. Of those, 19,246 individuals were in family units, 9,457 were unaccompanied children and 71,598 were single adults.

-The Democrats are giving Biden a pass on having "kids in cages", despite Biden building the cages in the first place- and now crowding them with four times more kids than Trump did!_
---

---
| _So now, thanks to Biden, there's an invasion of foreign nationals, many with COVID, and the Democrats are opening the doors and inviting them in._

TRAITORS!

AOC was seen crying at the cages two years ago. Now that Biden made the problem four times worse, she is silent.

**__These traitors and hypocrites have created the worst crisis the country has had in decades- all through bad policy choices. __**

_They have tried to keep the blunder secret from their friends in the liberal media. _

They don't deserve power. These people are acting in the interest of foreign citizens, against the American people!

We are spending money to let the American people know about the crisis Biden is trying to hide from them- especially people in swing districts! We won't let him get away with this! [We will make sure that the American people can fight back against the Traitor Left!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=f6c63a3e75&e=ba6e67b849)

Open Borders will never be welcome in the GOP again. [Your $25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000 or more will help us support an America First majority](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=a348b244f4&e=ba6e67b849)!

Biden and the Squad don't want YOU to know about this crisis. Let's make sure Americans know what the Left has planned for us!

[Donate now.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=4a22a866f0&e=ba6e67b849)

body:
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010U3KphBH9o_e6ZnI0cD0JVGUEOOtMgVGdclbEDnm60DAkW50rQ0lY8ZEFRXeSVSxv9FxdlmwNIv_uEL39x1FxjVNvCXxpMsfvfXnn21nTXVERX1UeuUm2dUGJdWtjdq7QC-uqb6-hOCGH0voSQdkmYZsd6y9wtu9cCb-lix0KJ4YYpi8dGDga6RHXgHa47jez1MOnMxR2ttQq0vNdQfpczVYms6A3ewDAVuUIP-tOFaifQ0QEXjakahkthzku663PaCX4CBik0u_EIN9FdwCYv8Ye5qtG_SZFI6gvpEgqqb6g3cTzlgMU5XjsrzTkG9DFImaAUrBEZSVLD3eNd-7Hie-8287KBzUvQ_1a2r3PbZIafVPVJcIGUXW5Vk2mtNCrvzniPtAiMlNx29M_LqVxiCnREXaH9--&c=_5zFwHHY-zmlx7-jBNKM5DaletdlM5F7YniN0rR-2x9ktUrgTdTl1A==&ch=bwq6nGmQU3irnG-mtRL-Q0zxH7P1C1R9Ux8_h4Frddh6TVzP7X7Krw==)
Hey Friend,

It's Dan Crenshaw. Do you have a minute to read a quick message about my friend Tony Gonzales?

Tony is everything that Pelosi, AOC and the radical mob tells you doesn't exist: _**a young, conservative, Hispanic, and veteran,**_ and they want him GONE.

**[JOIN DAN CRENSHAW -> SUPPORT TONY GONZALES](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010U3KphBH9o_e6ZnI0cD0JVGUEOOtMgVGdclbEDnm60DAkW50rQ0lY8ZEFRXeSVSxv9FxdlmwNIv_uEL39x1FxjVNvCXxpMsfvfXnn21nTXVERX1UeuUm2dUGJdWtjdq7QC-uqb6-hOCGH0voSQdkmYZsd6y9wtu9cCb-lix0KJ4YYpi8dGDga6RHXgHa47jez1MOnMxR2ttQq0vNdQfpczVYms6A3ewDAVuUIP-tOFaifQ0QEXjakahkthzku663PaCX4CBik0u_EIN9FdwCYv8Ye5qtG_SZFI6gvpEgqqb6g3cTzlgMU5XjsrzTkG9DFImaAUrBEZSVLD3eNd-7Hie-8287KBzUvQ_1a2r3PbZIafVPVJcIGUXW5Vk2mtNCrvzniPtAiMlNx29M_LqVxiCnREXaH9--&c=_5zFwHHY-zmlx7-jBNKM5DaletdlM5F7YniN0rR-2x9ktUrgTdTl1A==&ch=bwq6nGmQU3irnG-mtRL-Q0zxH7P1C1R9Ux8_h4Frddh6TVzP7X7Krw==)**
Tony is a fighter, Friend. He grew up in a tough environment, dropped out of high school, spent 20 years in the Navy fighting the War on Terror, and is now fighting for you in Congress. _Tony has lived the American Dream.

In his first few months in office, he has proven that he is everything he promised he would be for TX-23. He has stood up to the overreaching Biden Administration, fought for border security and legal immigration, and fought against Pelosi and AOC's radical socialist agenda. _

Dear Friend, Restoring confidence in the integrity of our elections is one of Glenn Youngkin’s top priorities. Glenn’s plan includes restoring strong voter ID measures, maintaining the cleanest voter rolls in the country, and returning independence to the Virginia Department of Elections. Glenn will also ensure mail-in ballots are verified and legitimate, require observer presence, and thoroughly audit voting machines. These are common sense steps that will ensure every legal vote is counted efficiently and accurately.

Peter, we just got breaking news: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26737237/277900795/-992972575?refcode=210325-email&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmYwNGQ1ZC1hZDhkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z5ewu8VuNa8F6ezwNWC1zpxlQk58UmNlepF62Ffygv8=) | [Stand with Rita »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26737239/277900797/-992972575?refcode=210325-email&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmYwNGQ1ZC1hZDhkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z5ewu8VuNa8F6ezwNWC1zpxlQk58UmNlepF62Ffygv8=)
---
_**POLITICO is reporting that Republicans are going on offense here in IA-02, the latest in their efforts to prevent all the votes from being counted in this historically close race.**_

| Patriot,
Our elected representatives should share the priorities of their constituents, which is why I am focused on making your priorities my own.
It is vital the members of Congress remember they are serving the public, not some radical ideology or personal agenda. I get my priorities by spending time in our community, holding town hall meetings, reading your emails, and talking with you on the phone.

| Let us remember the words of the great Abraham Lincoln on the purpose of preserving our great union, "Our government is of the people, by the people, and for the people." We must ensure our Republic is accountable to the people, and that starts with shared priorities.
Some of Our Priorities:

* Reliable Broadband in rural communities
* Emergency Preparedness for this year's hurricane season
* Access to COVID vaccinations
* Prioritizing domestic agricultural production
* Ensuring Constitutional rights are protected
* Border Security

I am focused on providing common sense solutions to North Central Florida's problems. It is imperative that we send the message to Washington to focus on putting America First! clean_body: We must all work together to succeed | | | | | | | Patriot, Our elected representatives should share the priorities of their constituents, which is why I am focused on making your priorities my own. It is vital the members of Congress remember they are serving the public, not some radical ideology or personal agenda. I get my priorities by spending time in our community, holding town hall meetings, reading your emails, and talking with you on the phone. | | | | | Let us remember the words of the great Abraham Lincoln on the purpose of preserving our great union, "Our government is of the people, by the people, and for the people." We must ensure our Republic is accountable to the people, and that starts with shared priorities. Some of Our Priorities: Reliable Broadband in rural communities Emergency Preparedness for this year's hurricane season Access to COVID vaccinations Prioritizing domestic agricultural production Ensuring Constitutional rights are protected Border Security I am focused on providing common sense solutions to North Central Florida's problems. It is imperative that we send the message to Washington to focus on putting America First! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for all your support! For Florida, | | Kat Cammack | | | | | | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Team Faulconer
subject: FWD: Gavin Newsom’s latest hypocrisy exposed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
Peter, **Did you see the latest from our hypocrite-in-chief Gavin Newsom?** He blatantly LIED about being a “Zoom school” parent. The truth is that his children have been attending in-person private school since at least November. **We only need 25 supporters to chip in right now for our Recall Campaign Fund to stay on track with our March fundraising goal. Will you step up and pitch in?** [**CHIP IN NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/ad3644b761e70f12/bbba0f8affb77d6dc3d6b838967d376c/34943) We need someone who understands what California families are going through, and who will fight for our children. We need Kevin Faulconer! **[Chip in now and stand with Kevin.>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/ad3644b761e70f12/59aa3d790c284a53c3d6b838967d376c/34943)** Thanks for your help,
Team Faulconer | |
---
To: All Supporters
From: Stephen Puetz, Campaign Manager
Date: Tuesday, March 23, 2021 7:00 p.m.
Subject: Gavin Newsom’s latest hypocrisy exposed
Friend,

You’ve probably already heard about Gavin Newsom’s latest outright mistruth.

**He recently claimed that he “gets it” because he’s a Zoom school parent too, but his kids have been learning in-person since at least November!**

Our children are suffering as a direct result of Newsom’s push for virtual learning, but now he’s claiming that “we’re all in this together?"

_His hypocrisy knows no end, so we need to end his reign in California._

Kevin has made opening schools his top issue of the campaign because he knows what’s it’s like for families with children beholden to the public schools’ teachers' unions. Unlike Gavin’s kids, Kevin’s attend public school, so he knows the pain California families are feeling right now.

This issue has transcended political ideology and party. We're ready to fight to get ALL of our children back into classrooms.

Californians are waking up to the fact that Gavin Newsom doesn’t care about our kids, our families, or even our state. Kevin is ready to lead the California Comeback, and we need everyone on board to remove this hypocritical elitist from office.

\- Stephen Puetz, Campaign Manager

**[P.S. Will you please chip in to help get Newsom out of office so we can get our kids back in school?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/ad3644b761e70f12/ae653420296a708ac3d6b838967d376c/34943)**
[**DONATE >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/ad3644b761e70f12/da4e82ba35283f9ec3d6b838967d376c/34943)

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: Biden Border Failure
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this [link](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57047970:J2u-EfuNP:m:1:3206719985:CCB247D585C109E22B0E2BBFF524A64A:r) **ALERT: Biden 's Homeland Security Secretary recently announced that "we are on pace to encounter more individuals on the southwest border than we have in the last 20 years." ** _This is ridiculous! We need open schools and churches, not open borders. If you agree, chip in now to fight the Biden-Harris Administration 's radical immigration policies._ [**SUPPORT SARAH FOR GOVERNOR >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57047971:J2u-EfuNP:m:1:3206719985:CCB247D585C109E22B0E2BBFF524A64A:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57047971:J2u-EfuNP:m:1:3206719985:CCB247D585C109E22B0E2BBFF524A64A:r) Peter, with just over 50 days in office, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have made a huge effort to fundamentally transform our country. He's issued a record number of executive orders. He's destroyed American energy independence, canceled thousands of jobs, and made plans for a historic tax hike! And now the Biden-Harris border failure is one of the worst things they've done so far. According to the Department of Homeland Security, the caravans flooding our southern border are setting records: more individuals today than in the last 20 years! All this while half the country is shut down. We can't open our businesses, our schools or places of worship, but we can open our borders? It's absolute nonsense and this is exactly the kind of radical policy I intend to fight as Governor. I recently went on Fox News to talk about this very subject. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57047971:J2u-EfuNP:m:1:3206719985:CCB247D585C109E22B0E2BBFF524A64A:r) [**WATCH NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57047971:J2u-EfuNP:m:1:3206719985:CCB247D585C109E22B0E2BBFF524A64A:r) Peter, conservatives are truly on the frontlines of defending our fundamental freedoms. It is the fight of our lifetime. And let me tell you, I will not be backed into a corner or silenced by the radical left. I will not bow to the radical agenda. I will not stand by and watch as Joe Biden and his allies open our borders, crush our economy, and welcome socialism into our country. **It's time to get real and fight back.** **We need to defend our borders and defend our nation. If you agree, please chip in now:** [**CHIP IN NOW TO SUPPORT SARAH FOR GOVERNOR**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57047971:J2u-EfuNP:m:1:3206719985:CCB247D585C109E22B0E2BBFF524A64A:r) Make no mistake, Peter, everything we love about America is at stake, and with the radical left now in control of Washington our governors become the last line of defense. That is why I'm running for Governor of Arkansas. To fight this fight for our freedom. I know I am the right person for the job, and I hope I have your support. My dad always said the real test of a leader is not the way you handle the issues you know are coming - it's rising to the moment in a crisis you can never plan for. I can say confidently, I learned that lesson while I served President Trump in the White House. I was there at the table with President Trump confronting our most dangerous adversaries like China and North Korea. When we fought and won big fights on tax cuts, border security, and conservative judges. We endured relentless threats and attacks through it all. In fact, I was the first White House press secretary to require Secret Service protection because of a credible violent threat against me! But we never lost focus on the most important thing: getting the job done. That's exactly what we need to do in every state right now. And I plan to do it myself in Arkansas! Please, chip in now to support my campaign. [**CHIP IN NOW >> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57047971:J2u-EfuNP:m:1:3206719985:CCB247D585C109E22B0E2BBFF524A64A:r) Thank you for your time, Peter. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57047971:J2u-EfuNP:m:1:3206719985:CCB247D585C109E22B0E2BBFF524A64A:r) Sarah Huckabee Sanders |

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Stop the Left's Plan to Flood America with Illegals
body:
When I jumped the wall surrounding Nancy Pelosi’s California mansion in 2019, I was pointing out the hypocrisy of the Democrat Party’s policies on immigration.
---
When I jumped the wall surrounding Nancy Pelosi’s California mansion in 2019, I was pointing out the hypocrisy of the Democrat Party’s policies on immigration.
| | | | Patriot,

[](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/Y8l1DKtXDwDT-KaqgLiF1bCj5V2Lg_9RHGQv6Sqw1sCmn-mG9-ROtomdTXhbVrV4e6gNvm5APElucwExOUV7wJMbMLQ_1rM3fHGdeDR2gsfkzC2Aw12Pma48kJPeVoDagvfIU4VPeV1_6bxmAVjK78l9NkLVA6N5w4QRgmVDaBYPlKXMRA0a2dhnfQY4ZCrSQNUKH46h3EL8K52WY8oPR6LCdn_b0rjep7g2FAnhhrecbUuITL3V5gvIKdt3N4ztdpJCfbMmMo_LgFbvWH-A1AOjM1BygMwLgBXq) When I jumped the wall surrounding Nancy Pelosi’s California mansion in 2019, I was pointing out the hypocrisy of the Democrat Party’s policies on immigration.

Today, Pelosi is protected by another wall surrounding the Capitol while hundreds of thousands of illegals are freely walking across America’s borders.

**What was just hypocrisy has turned into an overt attempt by Democrats to attract millions of immigrants to America’s doorstep while leaving the door wide open!**

The Trump Administration invoked Title 42 early last year to immediately expel illegal aliens apprehended at the border.

Now, Biden is backing off of Title 42, and as we saw with James O’Keefe’s work this week, **the migrant detention centers are busting at the seams**.

The Leftist Media continues to ignore this growing threat – **so I’m starting my investigation to give Americans a firsthand look at the border surge . . . and what’s causing it**.

[**Chip in to fund my investigation.**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/eg0Q4ygNPCr9aJV9w-Tg5RqlnOaxnK3GE9V7UR57lhGoejuEU5YVDTthpS3LVKQ3WlBIIaBo71oGFNarm19nQFGebXBAAiIEUd2Wwfj--QWcOL7nAfmboWzcLw0o3jwjquHTNYU1ArDrDeE2emi3BlAm3-1uS9mNLxu45b_s-EO_9RTnFiWfvdEzcwj-4QboZs09pyeKvfIaXOnc66EnpSKcGSiDfe_a06l9AR33ejy5gRPP0EYMqTLY7yE9UJIYGm8MBx3gCQ_dyrK2BlUKGRyxRIIXeHx67eMd)

I want America to hear from the border crossers themselves as they approach our borders.

I want the truth to come out about WHY they’re crossing – and confirm my hunch that it has to do with this HUGE number: **$4.38 BILLION DOLLARS**.

That’s the estimated payments of American tax dollars to illegals under the Democrats’ latest stimulus bill.

We need to expose both the fraud and waste of our tax dollars and tell the truth about the illegal surge that’s fueled by Pelosi and Biden’s policy of paying off illegal aliens.

[**Help me cover my travel costs, filming and editing so we can quickly expose the truth.**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/ocf3lB35_heTvFnoqpB2d4LpxlZnPJoq3lvEXL7cXq2kwQhLJjH_SGszPFe9UIm7aCT0shLlSS0_s7ceoJM7ytIqn1YyzC43QcP6lCXXFtpqnI-ydcoFxw3cxfhT50553X9oeyDVeViWZ8GT18Ph23H3Lhll-QXD20eC6Qo4eOjQXcTrMloQFU1WiyhVh2-ZEeLRHh2ocQJUOcs-at80AviFAq_7ObQCmrfg4w2NLZIVBLAJY-PfEyzhkubtoEGwdA1o-vBh9tVP39DwcoD_skLEbVja5qsr0FZD)

Thank you again for all that you do, and stay tuned . . .

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

subject: The New York Times just reported:

subject: Biden-Made Border Crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Democrats have no plan to solve the crisis on our southern border. | | | | |
---
Can't read this? [Click here.](https://mailchi.mp/housefreedomfund/biden-made-border-crisis?e=b2c16e6198)
---
| | | |
---
| | | | Peter:

Democrats won't let kids go to school or restaurants open at 100% capacity, but they don't seem to care about COVID-19 when it comes to illegal migrants crossing the border.

Why?

The answer simple: their priorities are wrong. They care more about illegal migrants than hard-working American families.

**That's why I'm working with the House Freedom Fund to elect principled conservative leaders to Congress.**

You see, electing just any Republican isn't good enough – especially when it comes to securing our nation's borders. Some Republicans even want to work with the Democrats to pass amnesty.

This can't happen! We need strong conservatives who will keep their word and fight for our principles.

[**Please join me in supporting the House Freedom Fund and their priority candidates with a generous contribution.**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=0ae83546ca&e=b2c16e6198)

They are helping conservatives like U.S. Reps. **Lauren Boebert** (R-CO), **Yvette Herrell** (R-NM), and **Scott Perry** (R-PA).

We need their leadership in Washington now more than ever.

The Biden Administration has released migrants into our neighborhoods without a court date and is using our tax dollars to pay for illegal migrants to stay in hotels.

And the Democrats have no plan to fix any of it!

President Biden refuses to visit the border, House Democrats refuse to hold hearings, and the media refuses to hold them accountable.

[**Please help us fight back by supporting principled conservatives.**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=c48a0a204c&e=b2c16e6198)

Together, we can secure our borders and make America great again.

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| JIM JORDAN
U.S. Congressman, R-Ohio

---
|
---
| **END OF MONTH DEADLINE**

Help us stop the far-left takeover and protect our freedoms
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001L--UtF7N88a2mro8vbzmgoeZcoo1mVI4n_ULL_OyFhj55br37wmPGBeC05IXjpHttauT8_Kuw4A-uBbHJJdF8HbHcHyRxdbZfR0uw24bHioqmCSUT4Yy3iMwcrHjlm3hI5sYli2PnnCetd9l61pjNV_heF9ngXQeG--IDfppfPILzFcyD89n14NnAsSKQh0j1b3MiaQMCVAXbMzzxq3Jzs6l8-9nMGmDmJdCHXqtTEgKUFHz4cKdf1kN60rkTTCO1SL9zPcSMAox1yHyVV_t71b7Lc29-Kg0qaL8EID91QyW4SqwecBaGMydiWU0kn_gqd0rH2tiyX97u_eALraC7K5kyLWELPmXRj1uZYKpKxuowQL9ZtXFVjI7FoOMA-j2Og8gzz35qtb7y_NMaMtAueUmwjUkptOYIGR_aLHu2wihRwhcvH8_CpCaRrI6cLptKqqwmdPzcWe5jNPtYX3voQ==&c=AXua5hf5hXRxCrc-_D4D6ZU2NaDBzvCnurk3DWOGl03E0cCnrCsmXg==&ch=SeQ-1hPeTEYY7TOFmgxNn1wIcnbyRUSQcYAUElafFQUtSjJBnRcnAQ==)
_Freedoms violated.
Kids left behind.
Struggling businesses.
Higher taxes._

This is the Pennsylvania that Tom Wolf has created over the last few years. This is not the future that I want for our state, and I'm sure this is not the future you want. And together we can stop them. **[TAKE PENNSYLVANIA BACK](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001L--UtF7N88a2mro8vbzmgoeZcoo1mVI4n_ULL_OyFhj55br37wmPGBeC05IXjpHttauT8_Kuw4A-uBbHJJdF8HbHcHyRxdbZfR0uw24bHioqmCSUT4Yy3iMwcrHjlm3hI5sYli2PnnCetd9l61pjNV_heF9ngXQeG--IDfppfPILzFcyD89n14NnAsSKQh0j1b3MiaQMCVAXbMzzxq3Jzs6l8-9nMGmDmJdCHXqtTEgKUFHz4cKdf1kN60rkTTCO1SL9zPcSMAox1yHyVV_t71b7Lc29-Kg0qaL8EID91QyW4SqwecBaGMydiWU0kn_gqd0rH2tiyX97u_eALraC7K5kyLWELPmXRj1uZYKpKxuowQL9ZtXFVjI7FoOMA-j2Og8gzz35qtb7y_NMaMtAueUmwjUkptOYIGR_aLHu2wihRwhcvH8_CpCaRrI6cLptKqqwmdPzcWe5jNPtYX3voQ==&c=AXua5hf5hXRxCrc-_D4D6ZU2NaDBzvCnurk3DWOGl03E0cCnrCsmXg==&ch=SeQ-1hPeTEYY7TOFmgxNn1wIcnbyRUSQcYAUElafFQUtSjJBnRcnAQ==)**
**That 's where my new organization Freedom PA comes in.** We are a group dedicated to the undeniable notion that freedom is essential to our society, and it's time to bring it back to Pennsylvania. We want to use conservative ideas to renew and repair this great state. We want to promote free enterprise, reduce the size of government, allow school choice, and ensure public safety. _But we can 't do any of this without your help.__****_[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001L--UtF7N88a2mro8vbzmgoeZcoo1mVI4n_ULL_OyFhj55br37wmPGBeC05IXjpHttauT8_Kuw4A-uBbHJJdF8HbHcHyRxdbZfR0uw24bHioqmCSUT4Yy3iMwcrHjlm3hI5sYli2PnnCetd9l61pjNV_heF9ngXQeG--IDfppfPILzFcyD89n14NnAsSKQh0j1b3MiaQMCVAXbMzzxq3Jzs6l8-9nMGmDmJdCHXqtTEgKUFHz4cKdf1kN60rkTTCO1SL9zPcSMAox1yHyVV_t71b7Lc29-Kg0qaL8EID91QyW4SqwecBaGMydiWU0kn_gqd0rH2tiyX97u_eALraC7K5kyLWELPmXRj1uZYKpKxuowQL9ZtXFVjI7FoOMA-j2Og8gzz35qtb7y_NMaMtAueUmwjUkptOYIGR_aLHu2wihRwhcvH8_CpCaRrI6cLptKqqwmdPzcWe5jNPtYX3voQ==&c=AXua5hf5hXRxCrc-_D4D6ZU2NaDBzvCnurk3DWOGl03E0cCnrCsmXg==&ch=SeQ-1hPeTEYY7TOFmgxNn1wIcnbyRUSQcYAUElafFQUtSjJBnRcnAQ==)

[**Kamala Harris to hold discussion with Bill Clinton on 'empowering women and girls,' igniting criticism**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R-qfRkQlBcHcrGxuIMpsdC-1yuxUjtyCOawu6S6iMB7tR6wVz3YHx8Sjaf3Zk29iecfgZFZKw6sGHeJUqU5VjsoHVJk331H9o_bEyx8VvVSpFDzaG3QjbjTjaoZ575bK5_mEbrRl1icGpABEM09muqrjQy6wbvEQyRiPqPnP4PWs73qXFIkFoe2e87QoIyUW2klPYXHNeZm6o_gkShSTXvapVMvXq2FM06t-g7jczsSjDpExpacfj7qrd-CILT1HcABx6HQdIvrS7rp-VzPvt11N6xYO0p8n9Udd4VmHqmVDzf9Pa3aM93mWmPz2e0wZOTzDn3SxvXJsZTqk0ma1qqaPOOSG2VQplwRCmOM3TAw6sV27hRRTGRw13npXtsN_UEyuD76Z8x7LJ_rL8_6SE5MWRopa22XjGGWbrdMtHxFb1r-0lAnVf2eHrOCfCVV8gGGYeMcYX_u5CwjE4lRRf3V4UmeP2L2dl0nQdPRUyfkfVNR9uarxlY_pYAXJxAI8dg-MaO504Ka2F31qO5ShU5d7rI9wUKPwnp2i2G6MlVO9Y59mVZPes5pU5CA0tCuj&c=sVDlL57z_ByV4zn6L7lMzzgAtcQNCcrqhJdgTuCB_cRuZqwFjtSIzg==&ch=hcOf0cR-0ffV2o1EQw-GaJbqPJYkgQLFSB-IWxjQUgQlsgs6FH27bQ==)
-Fox News

Friend, when we first saw this we couldn't believe our eyes...

This is as offensive as it is tone-deaf. Women everywhere should be offended that the Democratic Party would invite ANYONE with a history of sexual misconduct towards women to speak on female empowerment.

**Kamala Harris has failed women everywhere by agreeing to this. What kind of example are they trying to set here?? It shouldn't matter if you're left or right, do you think BILL CLINTON should be speaking to our mothers, sisters and daughters about being an empowered woman today?**

It should be an easy answer, Friend. For a party that touts itself as being the party of 'female empowerment' you'd think they would realize how inappropriate and insensitive this is.

It's more clear now than ever that Conservatives are the ones empowering women. While Democrats are giving disgraced and impeached President Bill Clinton a platform to speak on women, Republicans have more GOP women serving in the House than EVER BEFORE.

_**Democrats don 't want you to know this Friend, but GOP women won in nearly every district we flipped this past election. **_

It's clear which party is empowering women to be successful.

In light of National Women's Month, [**will you donate right now to support GOP Women and put an end to hypocrisy and absurdity that is now the Democratic Party?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R-qfRkQlBcHcrGxuIMpsdC-1yuxUjtyCOawu6S6iMB7tR6wVz3YHx8Sjaf3Zk29iecfgZFZKw6sGHeJUqU5VjsoHVJk331H9o_bEyx8VvVSpFDzaG3QjbjTjaoZ575bK5_mEbrRl1icGpABEM09muqrjQy6wbvEQyRiPqPnP4PWs73qXFIkFoe2e87QoIyUW2klPYXHNeZm6o_gkShSTXvapVMvXq2FM06t-g7jczsSjDpExpacfj7qrd-CILT1HcABx6HQdIvrS7rp-VzPvt11N6xYO0p8n9Udd4VmHqmVDzf9Pa3aM93mWmPz2e0wZOTzDn3SxvXJsZTqk0ma1qqaPOOSG2VQplwRCmOM3TAw6sV27hRRTGRw13npXtsN_UEyuD76Z8x7LJ_rL8_6SE5MWRopa22XjGGWbrdMtHxFb1r-0lAnVf2eHrOCfCVV8gGGYeMcYX_u5CwjE4lRRf3V4UmeP2L2dl0nQdPRUyfkfVNR9uarxlY_pYAXJxAI8dg-MaO504Ka2F31qO5ShU5d7rI9wUKPwnp2i2G6MlVO9Y59mVZPes5pU5CA0tCuj&c=sVDlL57z_ByV4zn6L7lMzzgAtcQNCcrqhJdgTuCB_cRuZqwFjtSIzg==&ch=hcOf0cR-0ffV2o1EQw-GaJbqPJYkgQLFSB-IWxjQUgQlsgs6FH27bQ==)

Your donation will go to supporting strong female Republicans who are setting the right example for the next generation.

[**Please, don't allow us to continue living in a world where Bill Clinton is in charge of empowering women. Women everywhere should be offended that the Democratic Party would invite ANYONE with a history of sexual misconduct towards women to speak on female empowerment. Kamala Harris has failed women everywhere by agreeing to this. What kind of example are they trying to set here?? It shouldn't matter if you're left or right, do you think BILL CLINTON should be speaking to our mothers, sisters and daughters about being an empowered woman today? It should be an easy answer, Friend. For a party that touts itself as being the party of 'female empowerment' you'd think they would realize how inappropriate and insensitive this is. It's more clear now than ever that Conservatives are the ones empowering women. While Democrats are giving disgraced and impeached President Bill Clinton a platform to speak on women, Republicans have more GOP women serving in the House than EVER BEFORE. Democrats don 't want you to know this Friend, but GOP women won in nearly every district we flipped this past election. It's clear which party is empowering women to be successful. In light of National Women's Month, == Your donation will go to supporting strong female Republicans who are setting the right example for the next generation. == Thank you, McMorris Rodgers HQ == ** Paid for by McMorris Rodgers Win The Future Fund PO Box 2485 Springfield, VA 22152 == ** | | McMorris Rodgers | PO Box 2485, Springfield, VA 22152 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

The last 15 Presidents have held a solo news conference within 33 days of taking office. Biden has been hiding away because he knows what he's doing is putting Americans last! If you are tired of Biden's games, tired of the lies, and tired of him claiming he'll be a unifier and President for all while his administration pursues a liberal agenda, then does the exact opposite, then we need you to our stand with Trump BEFORE MIDNIGHT! Thank you, Senate Republicans If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. . | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
Help me reach my Q1 goal so we can keep IA leading!

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kQJek3RPvIWaS0fANM4HCSkhLzhkJCziaAyH8MbSSw3QrU3UFZ1xct7UG8oUoty7zx6dZVL64slwtZHZ-Z6rM3bVuC7C8y_tnJ8ul5Q_ACs7MajLl5rdDmoJfEoXYGpZDhludUcVoPOHXZFYitUbHzDl5SoUc-KqQiRcocXzEtroqI5LNYp5-fwcOKTV2OwlGlslIVBbk4boIrDx9cmF9KdZwRLd34iRNb3o4vq1DgZh4A7GITuwBZgOsAS8cZpJ54DwmxYDMCrZNDs6mNLUNenPd5miiliSRVjEbugfA8-2lJv2KUoHyA9bZ5HbK3cjufBWVIubGA_P2mvbQqTbPqqFp2UooyZxCN4EB8cJa_gmbPwHbfqXBZOn1XCtbUraIEmkcJcG29rwTPZDq9wdFp1r0mh8Ejl9ppFNqACXbijPksQYMK22LKNUbDeWk3XG6MIUJx_JagHnkPqJ32oORazHHVBbTInn&c=tIRQxOGITk4cQCXAl1gCouhA-ykLxfYzqcDo4WdPjQlm4gCf__3mgA==&ch=w7S4IvQ-FXMeYSPbM1NaqgNIjko8m1f7r1riqbGWGxUKV4R836UItQ==)
Hi, Friend,
I am working hard to keep Iowa moving in the right direction. So far this year Iowa is leading the nation by:
✅ Having our kids back in the classroom since last August
✅Reopening Iowa safely and responsibly
✅ Having the 3rd lowest unemployment rate in the nation
✅ Our GDP growth is FASTER than the national average
✅ Being the #1 state in opportunity
But we can't take our foot off the gas just yet.
**[**CHIP IN TO HELP TEAM REYNOLDS BEFORE 3/31**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kQJek3RPvIWaS0fANM4HCSkhLzhkJCziaAyH8MbSSw3QrU3UFZ1xct7UG8oUoty7zx6dZVL64slwtZHZ-Z6rM3bVuC7C8y_tnJ8ul5Q_ACs7MajLl5rdDmoJfEoXYGpZDhludUcVoPOHXZFYitUbHzDl5SoUc-KqQiRcocXzEtroqI5LNYp5-fwcOKTV2OwlGlslIVBbk4boIrDx9cmF9KdZwRLd34iRNb3o4vq1DgZh4A7GITuwBZgOsAS8cZpJ54DwmxYDMCrZNDs6mNLUNenPd5miiliSRVjEbugfA8-2lJv2KUoHyA9bZ5HbK3cjufBWVIubGA_P2mvbQqTbPqqFp2UooyZxCN4EB8cJa_gmbPwHbfqXBZOn1XCtbUraIEmkcJcG29rwTPZDq9wdFp1r0mh8Ejl9ppFNqACXbijPksQYMK22LKNUbDeWk3XG6MIUJx_JagHnkPqJ32oORazHHVBbTInn&c=tIRQxOGITk4cQCXAl1gCouhA-ykLxfYzqcDo4WdPjQlm4gCf__3mgA==&ch=w7S4IvQ-FXMeYSPbM1NaqgNIjko8m1f7r1riqbGWGxUKV4R836UItQ==)**
Democrats across Iowa and in Washington, D.C. are still trying to derail our progress by having us pay for their radical blue state bailout plan and trillion-dollar "relief" bill. I'm fighting back and standing with Republican Governors across the country to protect our states, but frankly, **_I need your support._**
Can I count on you to help me and my team reach our critical first-quarter fundraising goal? I know that if we reach this goal we can continue fighting to protect Iowa from D.C.'s radical left agenda. [_**Will you step up today and help us reach our quarterly goal before midnight on the 31st?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kQJek3RPvIWaS0fANM4HCSkhLzhkJCziaAyH8MbSSw3QrU3UFZ1xct7UG8oUoty7zx6dZVL64slwtZHZ-Z6rM3bVuC7C8y_tnJ8ul5Q_ACs7MajLl5rdDmoJfEoXYGpZDhludUcVoPOHXZFYitUbHzDl5SoUc-KqQiRcocXzEtroqI5LNYp5-fwcOKTV2OwlGlslIVBbk4boIrDx9cmF9KdZwRLd34iRNb3o4vq1DgZh4A7GITuwBZgOsAS8cZpJ54DwmxYDMCrZNDs6mNLUNenPd5miiliSRVjEbugfA8-2lJv2KUoHyA9bZ5HbK3cjufBWVIubGA_P2mvbQqTbPqqFp2UooyZxCN4EB8cJa_gmbPwHbfqXBZOn1XCtbUraIEmkcJcG29rwTPZDq9wdFp1r0mh8Ejl9ppFNqACXbijPksQYMK22LKNUbDeWk3XG6MIUJx_JagHnkPqJ32oORazHHVBbTInn&c=tIRQxOGITk4cQCXAl1gCouhA-ykLxfYzqcDo4WdPjQlm4gCf__3mgA==&ch=w7S4IvQ-FXMeYSPbM1NaqgNIjko8m1f7r1riqbGWGxUKV4R836UItQ==)

clean_body: Help me reach my Q1 goal so we can keep IA leading! == Hi, Friend, I am working hard to keep Iowa moving in the right direction. So far this year Iowa is leading the nation by: ✅ Having our kids back in the classroom since last August ✅Reopening Iowa safely and responsibly ✅ Having the 3rd lowest unemployment rate in the nation ✅ Our GDP growth is FASTER than the national average ✅ Being the #1 state in opportunity But we can't take our foot off the gas just yet. == Democrats across Iowa and in Washington, D.C. are still trying to derail our progress by having us pay for their radical blue state bailout plan and trillion-dollar "relief" bill. I'm fighting back and standing with Republican Governors across the country to protect our states, but frankly, I need your support. Can I count on you to help me and my team reach our critical first-quarter fundraising goal? I know that if we reach this goal we can continue fighting to protect Iowa from D.C.'s radical left agenda. == Help us reach our Q1 GOAL: == == == == == == I hope I can continue to count on your help! subject: Running out of time

body:
| |
---
| | [ ](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=f01aebd1c8&e=0b94e583bc)
---
| |
Ever since I got to the U.S. Senate a little over two months ago, I've done exactly what I said I'd do: put Kansans and Americans first.

I’ve been to our southern border and urged swift action to end Joe Biden’s Border Crisis. I’ve put forward a plan to end the death tax once and for all. _And Josh Hawley, Ted Cruz, and I stood for election integrity._

**None of this has made me any friends in the Swamp.** The liberal media, Big Tech, and Democrats across the country have all made me one of their top targets.

**And that’s just fine by me — but to continue making a difference, I need your help.**

Our FIRST End of Quarter Deadline is less than a week away — and we need to raise another $40,000 online. [**If you’re able, will you please chip in whatever you can?**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=2b3571abcc&e=0b94e583bc)
---

---

---
| [DONATE $15 »](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=695e302059&e=0b94e583bc "DONATE $15 »")
---
| _Biden and the Democrats have Hollywood liberals and radical donors across the country — and they’re already raising MILLIONS to attack conservatives like me and keep their majority in the U.S. Senate. _

I have YOU — and for us to continue making a difference this year and ultimately take back the U.S. Senate next year, I need you to stand with me starting now.

**Can I count on you?** The clock is ticking.

[**If you’re able, please chip in just $20.22 now to help us reach our goal.**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=b77653f81e&e=0b94e583bc)

Senator Roger Marshall

**He's taking our Kansas values to the U.S. Senate, but he can't get it done without your help.**

We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Laura=20Loomer?=
subject: Uh Oh. Did Illegals with COVID just get flown to your city?
body:
Radical Dems are allowing Illegals to pour in the border including rapists, criminals, people with COVID and they are now flying them to your City! |
---
| |
---
| Dear Patriot,

There is a **CRISIS** at the border and radical**Leftists** like my **opponent** Lois Frankel, Nancy Pelosi, and Joe Biden are turning a blind eye to it, putting humans in cages they said they were against, and literally loading up airplanes with illegals, criminals, and **people** with COVID to fly them to airports in **YOUR** city! _**Do you feel safe yet?**_
---
| For years, _**Congress has failed**_ to pass comprehensive immigration reform, fix known loop-holes, and MORE! It wasn’t until recently when former President Donald Trump got into office, that we received
1. Desperately needed support and funding for Customs and Border Patrol
2. Plans and budgets to improve and extend the walls protecting our Southern border
3. A clear message sent to illegals that illegal immigration would not be tolerated.

---
| | [ ](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=6eb18dcd0f&e=4d7c0901a7)
---
RIGHT NOW, the Democrats are taking the country in a very dangerous direction, and _I am running for US Congress in Florida’s 21st District to help Republicans take back the House of Representatives, and restore order in DC_!
---
| **We are at a pivotal time in our history where the fate of our nation depends on what we do TODAY. I am willing to fight, bring attention to the issues, and hold Nancy Pelosi and Lois Frankel accountable for every vote, BUT I cannot do it alone, and need your [HELP HERE](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=db2828effb&e=4d7c0901a7). Can we save America together?**
---
| Many American’s build fences in their back yards and want their homes, family, and property to be safe and protected, yet radicals oppose fences around our treasured nation's border and are extremely vocal about establishing “Sanctuary cities". These “Sanctuary cities" have grown into havens for drugs, crimes, human trafficking, and economic despair.
---
| | [ ](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=d998ab7097&e=4d7c0901a7)
---
On Jan. 14, 2019, many of you saw the viral news that as an investigative journalist, I converged on Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s luxurious Napa Valley mansion with three “undocumented” men on her lawn to exposre her hypocrisy.
---
| Nancy Pelosi thinks it's okay that undocumented, illegal, and potentially dangerous individuals are in **YOUR** back yard, so I felt it was time to see how Nancy would react if the illegals were sent to her property! Nancy as you can imagine, was NOT pleased and had the local law enforcement “Catch and Release” the “undocumented” men from Guatemala and Mexico who hopped the fence with me at Casa de Nancy.

**Radical Left Congressional Democrats LOVE to pass laws that other Americans are bound by, but Congress itself does not abide by.**
---
| During the COVID-19 pandemic, as millions of American's economic situations worsened and the unemployment rate skyrocketed, Democrats like Nancy Pelosi, Lois Frankel, and others continued to push for open borders and stimulus checks for illegal aliens while Americans who found themselves without a job were left hung out to dry.
---
| | [ ](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=b732195551&e=4d7c0901a7)
---
I am an unapologetic patriotic American! I cannot and will not stand by and allow this to happen without a fight, and when I am elected to Congress, Washington DC is going to be in for a rude awakening! Do you feel safe yet? | For years, Congress has failed to pass comprehensive immigration reform, fix known loop-holes, and MORE! It wasn’t until recently when former President Donald Trump got into office, that we received 1. Desperately needed support and funding for Customs and Border Patrol 2. Plans and budgets to improve and extend the walls protecting our Southern border 3. A clear message sent to illegals that illegal immigration would not be tolerated. | | RIGHT NOW, the Democrats are taking the country in a very dangerous direction, and I am running for US Congress in Florida’s 21st District to help Republicans take back the House of Representatives, and restore order in DC! | We are at a pivotal time in our history where the fate of our nation depends on what we do TODAY. I am willing to fight, bring attention to the issues, and hold Nancy Pelosi and Lois Frankel accountable for every vote, BUT I cannot do it alone, and need your . Can we save America together? | Many American’s build fences in their back yards and want their homes, family, and property to be safe and protected, yet radicals oppose fences around our treasured nation's border and are extremely vocal about establishing “Sanctuary cities". These “Sanctuary cities" have grown into havens for drugs, crimes, human trafficking, and economic despair. | | On Jan. 14, 2019, many of you saw the viral news that as an investigative journalist, I converged on Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s luxurious Napa Valley mansion with three “undocumented” men on her lawn to exposre her hypocrisy. | Nancy Pelosi thinks it's okay that undocumented, illegal, and potentially dangerous individuals are in YOUR back yard, so I felt it was time to see how Nancy would react if the illegals were sent to her property! Nancy as you can imagine, was NOT pleased and had the local law enforcement “Catch and Release” the “undocumented” men from Guatemala and Mexico who hopped the fence with me at Casa de Nancy. Radical Left Congressional Democrats LOVE to pass laws that other Americans are bound by, but Congress itself does not abide by. | During the COVID-19 pandemic, as millions of American's economic situations worsened and the unemployment rate skyrocketed, Democrats like Nancy Pelosi, Lois Frankel, and others continued to push for open borders and stimulus checks for illegal aliens while Americans who found themselves without a job were left hung out to dry. | | I am an unapologetic patriotic American! I cannot and will not stand by and allow this to happen without a fight, and when I am elected to Congress, Washington DC is going to be in for a rude awakening!
